detectors.description:

		- (success,None) = address(marketingWallet).call{value: ethForMarketing}() (BaseERC20Token.sol#1489)
		- (success,None) = address(marketingWallet).call{value: address(this).balance}() (BaseERC20Token.sol#1505)

	- swapAndLiquify() (BaseERC20Token.sol#1333)

		- (success,None) = address(marketingWallet).call{value: ethForMarketing}() (BaseERC20Token.sol#1489)
		- (success,None) = address(marketingWallet).call{value: address(this).balance}() (BaseERC20Token.sol#1505)

	- _balances[address(this)] += fee_scope_0 (BaseERC20Token.sol#1347)

detectors.description:
BaseERC20Token._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BaseERC20Token.sol#1237-1369) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- fee = _amount * totalBuyTax / 100 (BaseERC20Token.sol#1285)
	- tokensForLiquidity += fee * liquidityBuyTax / totalBuyTax (BaseERC20Token.sol#1293)
